prompt: We have the analysis findings and use-case catalogue for a retail banking client and need to figure out what platform to build and how to roll it out. How should I run this?
assertions: Response correctly infers this is Phase A (the user has Session 1 outputs and wants to design) without asking the user to clarify Phase A vs Phase B
Response presents the structured four-phase session layout with output files
Response ties the design work to the Session 1 findings (F-##) and selected use cases rather than designing in the abstract
Response treats the reference architecture pattern library as a menu of options to select from, not a fixed template to copy wholesale
